title: DrumBurp: Finalize language selector strings and update docs
original_text: Let me check the current state first: Good. Now let me add the two new strings from the language menu to the .ts files and wrap them, then update the roadmap and do a final audit: Good — all three new strings are wrapped. Now regenerate the .ts files to pick them up, add their Spanish translations, and recompile:
expected_subject: feat(i18n): finalize language selector strings and update docs
expected_body_lines: - Wrap new UI labels for language selection with self.tr()
- Regenerate .ts files and add Spanish translations for new entries
- Compile updated .qm binaries to include latest changes
- Update ROADMAP_i18n.md to reflect completion of Phase 6
- Perform final audit to ensure all user-facing text is localized
expected_command: git commit -m "feat(i18n): finalize language selector strings and update docs"
